title: Dan Koe official homepage
summary: Main positioning: author of The Art of Focus, co-founder of Eden, writer on mind/internet/future. Shows newsletter and product ecosystem.
notes: Reader count appears inconsistent across page sections; treat as snapshot.

title: Koe Letters archive
summary: Official blog/letter archive for human potential, lifestyle design, digital business.
notes: Use as primary source for public essays.

title: future/proof About
summary: Substack mirror of weekly Koe Letter; tagline: stay relevant.
notes: Good canonical page for current Substack positioning.

title: future/proof Writing Strategies
summary: Topic page with long-form writing, content map, one-person business launchpad, short-form drills, content ecosystem.
notes: Some articles are paid; keep only public metadata unless subscribed.

title: future/proof Marketing Strategies
summary: Topic page with product launch, landing pages, digital product, one-person business launchpad.
notes: Use for productization topic map.

title: The Art of Focus
summary: Book page for The Art of Focus: focus, meaning, reinvention, ideal future, one-person business philosophy.
notes: Page includes older Carrd/template fragments; use main book sections only.

title: Purpose & Profit PDF
summary: Free official PDF; chapters include jobs, entrepreneurship, deep generalism, life work, value creation, self-monetization, creator.
notes: Do not reproduce long excerpts; use summaries and personal notes.

title: 2 Hour Writer
summary: Course page for digital writing and 2 Hour Content Ecosystem; includes public description of repurposing newsletter into social/video/podcast.
notes: Sales claims and student counts are self-reported.

title: Modern Mastery HQ
summary: Official page says community is closed and prior content moved to Kortex Premium; historic focus on one-person business growth.
notes: Useful for historical offer architecture.

title: Kortex homepage
summary: Kortex is becoming Eden; describes AI second brain, writing, capture, AI workflows.
notes: Use current page because product is changing.

title: Kortex to Eden migration
summary: Explains Eden rollout, core features, subscription handling, and why Kortex pivoted.
notes: Important for current product status.

title: Kortex team
summary: Lists Dan Koe as Co-Founder & CEO, Matthew Ao as Co-Founder & CPO, plus CTO/design/engineering/support team.
notes: Key correction to the idea that every asset is a one-person company.

title: Eden homepage
summary: AI creative partner with agents, capture, workspace, canvas, search, content planning, automation.
notes: Current product positioning as of capture date.

title: Future-Proof Skill Stack
summary: Framework for future-proof work: entrepreneurship, marketing/sales, writing/thinking, technical know-how, personal interests.
notes: High-priority essay for database.

title: Future of the Creator Economy
summary: Discusses creator economy and productization through desirable goal, starting point, unique path, holistic solution.
notes: Useful for offer design.

title: AGI Will Make You Irrelevant
summary: Frames AI as a tool that needs human agency and goal-setting; argues for human creativity and future-proofing.
notes: Use as AI philosophy source.

title: Point of View Over Niche
summary: Argues creators need a point of view rather than a narrow niche; identity, goals, values, and interests create differentiation.
notes: Strong source for brand positioning.

title: 2-Hour Content Ecosystem public preview
summary: Public preview of paid Substack post: turn one high-quality writing piece into posts for all platforms; build a body of work.
notes: Do not reproduce paid material.

title: The Koe Cast on Apple Podcasts
summary: Podcast page shows topic positioning around creative work, human behavior, mental philosophy; platform metadata includes episodes and ratings.
notes: Platform metadata can drift.

title: Dan Koe YouTube channel
summary: Official YouTube channel linked from Dan Koe homepage.
notes: Use platform directly for latest video list.

title: Social Blade Dan Koe YouTube snapshot
summary: Third-party snapshot shows approximate YouTube subscribers, views, and videos.
notes: Use only as approximate audience scale, not authoritative.
